name: Hetzner Cloud
description: Monitor Hetzner Cloud servers and firewall configuration for EU infrastructure compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Hetzner Cloud Console at https://console.hetzner.cloud
2. Go to your Project → Security → API Tokens
3. Generate a Read-only token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Hetzner Cloud Console → Project → Security → API Tokens. Use Read-only access.

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all Hetzner Cloud servers for infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verifies Hetzner Cloud firewall rules are configured for network security
